message: Hey everyone. I'm pumped today about our flash sale
You know it's been 53 years since the Beatles released Abbey Road right? My favourite album
53 years already?? Wow that makes me feel old...
Indeed! We're celebrating today by promoting a flash sale on retro items from 1969
I re-watched Paul McCartney's Glastonbury set last night to get in the mood!
*Incident Number INC100090:* sev1 testing
Clicked Start button
That sounds great Bez. Huge Beatles fan myself here
We've just deployed a couple of changes into prod earlier but we should be all good
We're a step closer to allowing folks to pay for items from the 1960s with Bitcoin thanks to Daniel!
Think of it like time travelling!
Wow good work Daniel! Looking forward to seeing it in action in prod
How's the test-driven development going?
TDDs going well. We are as solid as a rock! Though don't ask me what the Liskov Substitution Principle is...

Thanks Bob. Considering the orders are coming through, its just the order confirmation Service thats not working, we will run it as a Sev 2 incident, Im creating the incident as we speak
is there an incident ongoing?
*Incident Number INC100097:* Sev2 Order Confirmations not working
But i made the change to payments service and the new code shouldn't be invoked yet

Hi Bez we have a Sev2 incident ongoing for issues with order confirmations. The orders itself are going through it is just the confirmation that are not being received by customers. The teams are looking further into the issue
